productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

25$10.77 each

Catalog highlights

  • STOCK COLORS: Hot Pink, Lime, Mango Yellow, Pink, Houndstooth
  • Cook up something delicious in the kitchen for your customers and supporters with these professional grade chef's hats!
  • These pillbox-style toppers are made of a 65/35 polyester and cotton twill blend with a hook and loop closure to ensure a great fit for most wearers.
  • A great idea for professional cooks or a fun gift for your favorite amateur chef!
  • The unique design sits up higher than beanie-style caps, and are great for cooks and staff with smaller heads.

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Chef Pill Box Hat w/ hook and loop, colors - Blank. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style EC21C-BLANK on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 2 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 25 units (per catalog line).
